pi_items.source: Downloaded and analyzed dicom_viewer_0002.zip and dicom_viewer_0003.zip files from rubomedical.com used in the environment; both lack the WindowCenter DICOM tag. The metadata value of 40 is a hardcoded fallback from the setup script.

Downloaded and analyzed dicom_viewer_0002.zip and dicom_viewer_0003.zip files from rubomedical.com used in the environment; both lack the WindowWidth DICOM tag. The metadata value of 400 is a hardcoded fallback from the setup script.

privileged_info_summary: The environment automatically downloads real XA scan DICOM files (0002.DCM or 0003.DCM) from Rubo Medical. These files do not contain WindowCenter or WindowWidth DICOM tags, meaning Weasis auto-computes their initial display values based on the pixel range (0-255). The claimed values of 40 and 400 are incorrect and simply the result of a hardcoded fallback in the task's setup script. Furthermore, the task description incorrectly labels the loaded file as a CT scan, but it is actually an X-Ray Angiography (XA) scan.
